column2: Decision / Check
column4: NO → Action

column2: Is the substance GRAS (21 CFR 182/184) or Approved Food Additive (21 CFR 172–178) for this application?
column4: STOP. Find alternative or engage GRAS petition (18–24 months).

column2: Does the intended use level fall within FDA-permitted limits (e.g. Sucralose ≤0.024%; Canola erucic acid ≤2%)?
column4: Reformulate to within limits OR select different ingredient.

column2: Is the ingredient derived from a USDA NBFDS BE-listed crop? (Corn, Soy, Canola, Sugar Beet, Cotton, Potato, Alfalfa, Squash, Papaya, Salmon, Apple, Pineapple)
column4: → Step 4 (Non-BE ingredient — skip GMO steps)

column2: [BE-LISTED INGREDIENT] Is the ingredient highly refined (oil, purified sugar)? Check USDA AMS guidance for detectable modified material.
column3: Highly refined + no detectable modified material → document per AMS guidance → Step 4
column4: Not highly refined OR modified material detectable → NBFDS disclosure MANDATORY on finished food → Step 4

column2: Is the supplier's CoA available? Does every parameter meet your Layer 2 Acceptance Floor AND (for BE ingredients) GMO test result ≤ your Non-GMO threshold?
column4: Request reformulated grade or alternative. Issue SCAR. Do NOT accept non-conforming goods.

column2: Is this a foreign (non-US) supplier?
column4: → Skip to Step 7 (domestic: FSMA Part 117 applies)

column2: [FOREIGN ONLY] Is the FSVP file complete? Hazard analysis + GMO declaration on file + QI sign-off + FDA alert clear?
column4: Freeze import. Complete FSVP + GMO documentation. No PO until complete.

column2: Does the supplier hold FSSC 22000, BRC, or SQF L2+? AND (for Non-GMO claim) Non-GMO Project Verified OR USDA Organic cert?
column4: Conditional status. 3rd-party audit within 90 days. For Non-GMO claim: PCR per lot until certified.

column2: Has Layer 3 Weighted Scorecard been completed including GMO Risk dimension? Is composite score ≥ 70?
column4:
Score 55–69: Conditional + improvement plan.
Score <55: Disqualify.

column2: Is the supplier the ONLY source (single-source risk)?
column3: Proceed with caution. Develop backup supplier within 12 months.
column4: APPROVED. Add to preferred/approved list. Set annual re-qualification date.

column1: NON-NEGOTIABLE REQUIREMENTS — Must Obtain Before Signing Supplier Agreement

column2: Non-Negotiable Requirement
column4: Regulatory Basis

column2: SOC 2 Type II audit OR ISO 27001 certificate (if supplier holds your data digitally)
column4: Data security due diligence

column2: GDPR Data Processing Agreement with EU data residency guarantee (EU suppliers / EU operations)
column4: GDPR / DSGVO — data sovereignty

column2: Full sub-processor list (for digital/SaaS platforms)
column4: GDPR Art. 28; FSMA data integrity

column2: Complete FSVP file on record before first PO release (foreign suppliers only)
column4: 21 CFR Part 1 Subpart L — FSMA

column2: Recognised food safety certification (FSSC 22000, BRC AA/A, SQF Level 2+) or committed audit date
column4: FSMA 21 CFR Part 117

column2: Allergen management declaration (Big-9: peanut, tree nut, milk, egg, wheat, soy, fish, shellfish, sesame)
column4: FALCPA + FASTER Act 2021

column2: Lot-level batch traceability documentation per FDA Traceability Rule
column4: 21 CFR Part 1 Subpart S

column2: Certificate of Analysis with accredited lab sign-off (ISO/IEC 17025) for each lot
column4: FDA cGMP 21 CFR Part 117

column2: Written recall & withdrawal procedure with 2-hour notification commitment
column4: 21 CFR Part 7; FSMA mandatory recall authority

column2: Contractual right to audit with 48-hour notice
column4: FSMA supplier verification; SQF/BRC audit right

column2: GMO/BE Status Declaration — written confirmation of ingredient's NBFDS status and, if BE-listed, whether IP segregation or NBFDS disclosure is in place
column4: USDA NBFDS 7 CFR Part 66 — mandatory BE disclosure

column2: For Non-GMO claimed ingredients: IP Chain-of-Custody CoA + quantitative PCR test result (ISO 21570) ≤0.9% per lot
column4: Non-GMO Project Standard v14; EU Reg EC 1829/2003 (for EU export)
